info.title: Current directory: /tmp/inspectra-help-generate-api-proxy-8.0.3-01a5154e54fd4f739bdb594038bbcd15
info.description:
Usage pattern 1:
dotnet  Olive.ApiProxyGenerator.dll  [/assembly:...] [/serviceName:...] /controller:... /out:...
Usage pattern 2:
dotnet  Olive.ApiProxyGenerator.dll  [/assembly:...] [/serviceName:...] /controller:... /push:... /apiKey:...

arguments.name: ASSEMBLY: FILE NAME OF THE ASSEMBLY CONTAINING THE API. USUALLY IT'S THE PATH TO THE 'WEBSITE.DLL'.

SERVICENAME: THE NAME OF THE MICROSERVICE THAT PUBLISHES THIS API. IF NOT SPECIFIED THE APPSETTINGS VALUE OF "MICROSERVICE:ME:NAME" WILL BE USED. THE NAMESPACE OF THE GENERATED PROXY CLASSES WILL BE THIS VALUE SUFFIXED BY 'SERVICE'.
CONTROLLER: THE NAME OF THE API CONTROLLER CLASS, E.G. "MYCONSUMERAPI". IF THERE ARE MULTIPLE CLASSES WITH THE SAME NAME, PROVIDE THE FULL NAME WITH NAMESPACE.
OUT: THE FULL PATH TO A DIRECTORY TO PUBLISH THE GENERATED NUGET PACKAGES. E.G. C:\PROJECTS\MY-SOLUTION\PRIVATEPACKAGES
PUSH: THE URL OF A [PRIVATE] NUGET SERVER TO PUBLISH THE GENERATED PACKAGE TO. FOR EXAMPLE: HTTP://NUGET.MY-SOLUTION.MY-SERVER.COM/NUGET
APIKEY: THE API KEY EXPECTED BY THE [PRIVATE] NUGET SERVER, FOR SECURITY.
UNHANDLED EXCEPTION. SYSTEM.INVALIDOPERATIONEXCEPTION: CANNOT READ KEYS WHEN EITHER APPLICATION DOES NOT HAVE A CONSOLE OR WHEN CONSOLE INPUT HAS BEEN REDIRECTED. TRY CONSOLE.READ.
